caption.full:
Debbie McWilliams: Next James Bond must be an unknown

Former Bond casting director Debbie McWilliams believes the next 007 should be an unknown to preserve the character's enigma. She has cast three actors in the role over 13 films. Denis Villeneuve is set to direct the next installment.

Send this to a friend who loves Bond theories!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #JamesBond #007 #Casting
caption.firstComment: I’m team unknown — the less we recognize, the more the character can feel like a blank slate. What’s your take on who could pull off that mystery?

She has cast three actors in the role across 13 films. What do you think of her casting philosophy? Let us know below!

youtube.title: Debbie McWilliams: Next Bond Must Be 'Out of the Blue'
youtube.description:
Debbie McWilliams, who cast Timothy Dalton, Pierce Brosnan, and Daniel Craig, believes the next James Bond actor must be an unknown. She stated it is 'absolutely essential' for Bond to remain 'a total enigma,' and does not want to see rumored contenders like Jacob Elordi, Callum Turner, or Harris Dickinson in the role. Denis Villeneuve is set to direct the next film under new Amazon MGM Studios control.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/movies/industry-insider-debbie-mcwilliams-says-the-next-james-bond-actor-should-be/
